title: TelepostMissions
description: An addon that brings missions from Telepost
body:
# Introduction
This is a [Create: Missions](https://modrinth.com/mod/missions) addon.
For now it adds these missions:

- Get invited X times to a player's homepost
- Invite X times to your homepost

![Invite missions in the GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5b47fcUJ/images/496830cd5bcd7e1aff550b62cd64245533f66a94.png)

Fully configurable. Only server side mod.

# How to set up
- Install [Create: Missions](https://modrinth.com/mod/missions), [Telepost](https://modrinth.com/mod/telepost), and their dependencies
- Add [this mission config](https://github.com/Kryeit/TelepostMissions/blob/1.20/src/main/resources/config.json) to your `config/missions/missions.json` configuration file
- Get reassigned new missions, this mission will be one of the choices inside the mission pool
